hooks.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to set frontApp to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' -e 'if frontApp is not in {"wezterm-gui", "idea"} then display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'

osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to set frontApp to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' -e 'if frontApp is not in {"wezterm-gui", "idea"} then display notification "Done — ready for your next message" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
